sessions.intent: Implement Path class for action parameters with engine-resolvable source generator integration

before.assumptions: Source generator IsEngineResolvable pattern works for custom types. File handlers all use string Path + manual GetFullPath.
before.risk: Medium - touching source generator integration and all file handlers

sessions.plan: Create Path.cs, add PLangPath alias, register in TypeMapping, update 7 file handlers, update tests, create PathTests

actions.context: Rich path wrapper with Resolve(string, Engine) for source generator detection
Added PLangPath alias and path type registration
string Path -> PLangPath Path, use Path.Absolute/IsFile/IsDirectory/Directory/Extension
Updated for PLangPath, created 22 new Path tests, fixed System.IO.Path ambiguity

after.notes: Clean implementation. Source generator IsEngineResolvable pattern worked as expected.

sessions.intent: Address v2 review feedback — semantic IsFile/IsDirectory, ToString, Read/List/Save on Path, thin handlers

before.assumptions: v2 review identified 3 categories: semantic issues, OBP violations in read/list/save, error wrapping in handlers
before.risk: Low - behavioral changes are well-scoped, existing tests validate

sessions.plan: Change IsFile/IsDirectory to structural, ToString to Relative, add Read/List/Save to Path, make handlers one-liners, fix Copy/Move/Delete to use _fs directly

actions.context: IsFile/IsDirectory now structural (extension-based). ToString returns Relative. Added Read/List/Save methods. Copy/Move/Delete use _fs.File.Exists directly.
Reduced to one-line thin delegators calling Path.Read/List/Save
Updated IsFile/IsDirectory/ToString tests for structural semantics. Added 11 new tests for Read/List/Save.

after.notes: All review feedback addressed. Handlers are now pure delegators.

sessions.intent: Address v3 review: Path stores Engine, all handlers become pure delegators, tests use _fs

before.assumptions: v3 review identified 4 remaining issues: delete.cs handler logic, exists.cs direct @file creation, save.cs passing Engine as param, tests using System.IO
before.risk: Low - well-scoped changes, constructor signature change is internal to Path

sessions.plan: Path stores Engine.@this instead of IPLangFileSystem. Save drops engine param. Delete absorbs ignoreIfNotFound. Add AsFile(). All handlers become one-liners. Tests replace System.IO with _fs.

actions.context: Constructor takes Engine.@this, stores both _engine and _fs. Save uses _engine.Channels.Serializers internally. Delete absorbs ignoreIfNotFound param. Added AsFile().
All three handlers reduced to single-line pure delegators.
Replaced System.IO with _fs, added _engine field, added 2 new tests.

after.notes: All v3 review feedback addressed. Every file handler is now a pure one-line delegator.

sessions.intent: Address v4 review: handlers pass this to Path (OBP rule 2 — navigate, don't pass)

before.assumptions: v4 review: all handlers decompose action record properties into method parameters instead of passing action record itself
before.risk: Low - method signatures change but behavior is identical

sessions.plan: Path methods accept action records. Handlers pass this. Tests construct action records. AsFile rename skipped (conflicts with bool Exists property).

actions.context: Copy/Move/Delete/List/Save signatures changed from decomposed params to action record params.
All handlers now pass this.
All behavior tests construct action records.

sessions.intent: Review coder's v5 work on the Path class feature

before.assumptions: Coder has iterated 5 times, each addressing prior review feedback. v5 should be near-final with OBP rule 2 fully addressed.
before.risk: Low — review only, no code changes

sessions.plan: Read coder output (v1-v5), read OBP docs, review full git diff, read all source files and tests, check source generator integration, write review-comments.json.

actions.context: Read coder's output to understand intent and history
Full review of all modified source files
Reviewed test coverage and quality
9 findings: 1 major, 3 minor, 5 nits

after.health: Green — review only, no code changes.
after.notes: Code is solid after 5 iterations. Main concern is architectural coupling direction.

sessions.intent: First audit of Path class implementation (coder v5) — OBP compliance, safety, test quality

before.assumptions: Coder has gone through 4 review rounds with Ingi. OBP structure should be solid. Expecting edge cases and error handling gaps.
before.risk: Low — review only, no code changes

sessions.plan: Review Path.cs, all 7 file handlers, PathTests, FileHandlerTests. Cross-reference source generator, @file type, ServiceError, PLangFileSystem.RootDirectory. Write review-comments.json.

actions.context: Full review of Path class and all file handlers. Found 10 issues: 1 critical (no exception handling), 3 major (Relative prefix bug, Move.Overwrite ignored, Delete throws for non-empty dirs), 4 minor, 2 nits.
Test coverage is good for happy paths and not-found cases. Missing: exception paths (locked files, permission denied), file-to-directory copy semantics.
10 structured findings for the coder to act on

after.status: Review complete. 10 findings written to review-comments.json.
after.health: Path foundation is solid architecturally (OBP-compliant). Safety gaps need addressing before production use.
after.notes: The critical finding (#1 — no exception handling) affects every file handler. Recommend fixing that first.

sessions.intent: Fix auditor findings: exception handling, Relative prefix bug, Move/Delete edge cases, null guards, file-to-dir copy

before.assumptions: Auditor found 10 issues. Critical #1 (exception handling) affects all behavior methods. Major #2 (Relative prefix) is a subtle string bug. #3+#4 are edge cases users will hit.
before.risk: Low — well-scoped fixes, existing tests validate non-regression

sessions.plan: Wrap all behavior methods in try/catch. Fix Relative with trailing separator guard. Add directory overwrite to Move. Add non-empty check to Delete. Null guards. ResolveDestination for file-to-dir copy. Fix test namespace and explicit Pattern.

actions.context: try/catch in Copy/Move/Delete/Read/List/Save. Relative trailing separator guard. Move directory overwrite. Delete non-empty check. Null guards. ResolveDestination helper.
Namespace fix. Explicit Pattern. 6 new tests: Relative prefix, Move dir overwrite, Delete non-empty, null guards x2, Copy file-to-dir.

after.notes: Addressed 8 of 10 auditor findings. Skipped #5 (case-sensitive equality, Windows-primary) and #6 (operator ==, low risk).

sessions.intent: Re-review coder v6 fixes for auditor v1 findings

before.assumptions: Coder addressed 8 of 10 findings. Expecting straightforward fixes.

sessions.plan: Verify each fix: exception handling pattern, Relative guard, Move overwrite, Delete non-empty check, null guards, ResolveDestination, test namespace, Pattern defaults. Check for new issues introduced.

actions.context: All 8 fixes verified correct. 2 new minor observations: ResolveDestination not applied to Move, empty string for root Relative.
Updated with v6 review. 2 non-blocking findings. Recommend merge.

after.notes: All critical/major issues resolved. Two minor observations remain but are non-blocking.
